requirement_topic.en: REACH Restricted Substances in Furniture — Azo Dyes in Upholstery and Leather
requirement_topic.zh: 家具中REACH限制物质——软垫及皮革中偶氮染料
requirement_topic.zht: 家具中REACH限制物質——軟墊及皮革中偶氮染料

summary.en: REACH Annex XVII Entry 43 restricts the use of certain azo dyes that can release carcinogenic aromatic amines in leather and textile articles intended to come into prolonged contact with the human skin. For upholstered furniture with textile or leather covers, the restriction prohibits placing articles on the EU market where any restricted azo dye can be detected above 30 mg/kg in the dyed portion. The test method is EN ISO 14362-1 or EN ISO 14362-3 (for insoluble azo dyes). This applies across textile fibres and leather used in furniture upholstery.
summary.zh: REACH附件XVII第43条限制在皮革和纺织品物品中使用某些可释放致癌芳香胺的偶氮染料，此类物品的用途为与人体皮肤长时间接触。对于带纺织品或皮革面料的软垫家具，该限制禁止将任何受限偶氮染料在染色部分可检出含量超过30 mg/kg的物品投放欧盟市场。检测方法为EN ISO 14362-1或EN ISO 14362-3（适用于不溶性偶氮染料）。该限制适用于家具软垫所用的纺织纤维和皮革。
summary.zht: REACH附件XVII第43條限制在皮革和紡織品物品中使用某些可釋放致癌芳香胺的偶氮染料，此類物品的用途為與人體皮膚長時間接觸。對於帶紡織品或皮革面料的軟墊家具，該限制禁止將任何受限偶氮染料在染色部分可檢出含量超過30 mg/kg的物品投放歐盟市場。檢測方法為EN ISO 14362-1或EN ISO 14362-3（適用於不溶性偶氮染料）。該限制適用於家具軟墊所用的紡織纖維和皮革。

standards_or_laws: REACH Regulation (EC) No 1907/2006, Annex XVII Entry 43 — Certain azo dyes

EN ISO 14362-1 — Textiles — Methods for determination of certain aromatic amines derived from azo dyes — Part 1: Detection of the use of certain azo dyes accessible with and without extracting the fibres
EN ISO 14362-3 — Textiles — Methods for determination of certain aromatic amines derived from azo dyes — Part 3: Detection of the use of certain azo dyes, which may release 4-aminoazobenzene

summary.en: China's mandatory standard GB 28481-2012 (Safety technical requirements for furniture) incorporates restrictions on azo dyes in upholstery textiles, prohibiting use of certain azo dyes that can release carcinogenic aromatic amines (limit: 20 mg/kg for most, stricter than REACH's 30 mg/kg). However, GB 28481 applies to domestically sold furniture. Chinese export furniture must additionally comply with REACH Annex XVII for EU sale. Chinese test reports to GB 28481 are not directly substitutable for EU conformity documentation.
summary.zh: 中国强制性国家标准GB 28481-2012（家具安全技术要求）对软垫纺织品中的偶氮染料作出限制，禁止使用可释放致癌芳香胺的特定偶氮染料（大多数限值为20 mg/kg，比REACH的30 mg/kg更严格）。但GB 28481适用于国内销售的家具。中国出口家具还须额外符合REACH附件XVII方可在欧盟销售。依据GB 28481出具的中国检测报告不可直接替代欧盟合规文件。
summary.zht: 中國強制性國家標準GB 28481-2012（家具安全技術要求）對軟墊紡織品中的偶氮染料作出限制，禁止使用可釋放致癌芳香胺的特定偶氮染料（大多數限值為20 mg/kg，比REACH的30 mg/kg更嚴格）。但GB 28481適用於國內銷售的家具。中國出口家具還須額外符合REACH附件XVII方可在歐盟銷售。依據GB 28481出具的中國檢測報告不可直接替代歐盟合規文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 28481-2012 — Safety technical requirements for furniture (mandatory GB, SAMR)

gap.en: Upholstered furniture exported to the EU with textile or leather covers must be tested to EN ISO 14362-1/-3 by an accredited laboratory. Chinese GB 28481 test reports for azo dyes use a different standard reference and are not accepted as EU conformity evidence. Economic operators (importers or EU-established manufacturers) must hold test documentation for all textile/leather components in contact with skin. No CE marking is involved; compliance is a REACH restriction requirement enforced by market surveillance authorities.
gap.zh: 出口欧盟的带纺织品或皮革面料软垫家具，须由认可实验室依据EN ISO 14362-1/-3进行检测。中国依据GB 28481出具的偶氮染料检测报告引用不同的标准参考，不被欧盟合规文件所接受。经营者（进口商或欧盟境内制造商）须持有所有与皮肤接触的纺织品/皮革部件的检测文件。本项不涉及CE标志；合规属于REACH限制要求，由市场监督机构执行。
gap.zht: 出口歐盟的帶紡織品或皮革面料軟墊家具，須由認可實驗室依據EN ISO 14362-1/-3進行檢測。中國依據GB 28481出具的偶氮染料檢測報告引用不同的標準參考，不被歐盟合規文件所接受。經營者（進口商或歐盟境內製造商）須持有所有與皮膚接觸的紡織品/皮革部件的檢測文件。本項不涉及CE標誌；合規屬於REACH限制要求，由市場監督機構執行。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — REACH Annex XVII Entry 43 restriction applies to all textile and leather articles (including upholstered furniture) placed on the EU market; enforced by EU market surveillance authorities
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 28481-2012 is a mandatory national standard for furniture sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] REACH Annex XVII Entry 43 prohibits placing upholstered furniture with textile or leather covers on the EU market where restricted azo dyes exceed 30 mg/kg. This is a mandatory REACH restriction — no CE marking involved. Chinese GB 28481 test reports are not substitutes for EU conformity documentation. EN ISO 14362-1/-3 testing from an EU-accredited laboratory is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】REACH附件XVII第43条禁止将带纺织品或皮革面料且受限偶氮染料含量超过30 mg/kg的软垫家具投放欧盟市场。这是强制性REACH限制要求，不涉及CE标志。中国GB 28481检测报告不可替代欧盟合规文件。须由欧盟认可实验室进行EN ISO 14362-1/-3检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】REACH附件XVII第43條禁止將帶紡織品或皮革面料且受限偶氮染料含量超過30 mg/kg的軟墊家具投放歐盟市場。這是強制性REACH限制要求，不涉及CE標誌。中國GB 28481檢測報告不可替代歐盟合規文件。須由歐盟認可實驗室進行EN ISO 14362-1/-3檢測。

requirement_topic.en: REACH Substances of Very High Concern (SVHC) in Furniture Articles
requirement_topic.zh: 家具物品中REACH高度关注物质（SVHC）
requirement_topic.zht: 家具物品中REACH高度關注物質（SVHC）

summary.en: Under REACH Article 33, suppliers of articles containing Substances of Very High Concern (SVHC) on the ECHA Candidate List above 0.1% w/w must notify recipients and, upon consumer request, provide SVHC information within 45 days. Under REACH Article 7(2), producers or importers of articles must notify ECHA if an SVHC is present above 0.1% w/w and the total quantity exceeds 1 tonne/year per substance. The ECHA Candidate List is updated biannually and currently contains over 240 SVHCs (as of mid-2026). Furniture commonly contains materials (flame retardants, plasticisers, pigments, coatings) that may be or include SVHCs — particularly certain phthalates (restricted also under Annex XVII Entry 51), certain brominated flame retardants, and lead compounds.
summary.zh: 根据REACH第33条，提供含有ECHA候选清单中高度关注物质（SVHC）且含量超过0.1% w/w的物品的供应商，须向接收方告知相关信息，并在消费者要求时于45天内提供SVHC信息。根据REACH第7(2)条，物品生产商或进口商若物品中SVHC含量超过0.1% w/w，且每种物质年总量超过1吨，须向ECHA进行申报。ECHA候选清单每半年更新一次，截至2026年中期已包含240余种SVHC。家具常含有可能属于或含有SVHC的材料（阻燃剂、增塑剂、颜料、涂料）——尤其是某些邻苯二甲酸酯（同受附件XVII第51条限制）、某些溴代阻燃剂及铅化合物。
summary.zht: 根據REACH第33條，提供含有ECHA候選清單中高度關注物質（SVHC）且含量超過0.1% w/w的物品的供應商，須向接收方告知相關資訊，並在消費者要求時於45天內提供SVHC資訊。根據REACH第7(2)條，物品生產商或進口商若物品中SVHC含量超過0.1% w/w，且每種物質年總量超過1噸，須向ECHA進行申報。ECHA候選清單每半年更新一次，截至2026年中期已包含240餘種SVHC。家具常含有可能屬於或含有SVHC的材料（阻燃劑、增塑劑、顏料、塗料）——尤其是某些鄰苯二甲酸酯（同受附件XVII第51條限制）、某些溴代阻燃劑及鉛化合物。

standards_or_laws: REACH Regulation (EC) No 1907/2006, Article 33 — Duty to communicate information on substances in articles
REACH Regulation (EC) No 1907/2006, Article 7(2) — Notification of substances in articles
ECHA Candidate List of SVHCs (updated biannually)

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to the REACH SVHC Candidate List disclosure obligation for furniture articles. GB 28481-2012 restricts soluble heavy metals (lead, cadmium, chromium, mercury, barium, antimony, arsenic, selenium) in surface coatings and similar substances in wood parts. However, the scope and list of restricted substances under GB 28481 differ substantially from the ECHA Candidate List. Chinese exporters typically have no systematic SVHC tracking obligation under Chinese law, creating a documentation gap for EU market compliance.
summary.zh: 中国对家具物品没有与REACH SVHC候选清单披露义务直接对应的制度。GB 28481-2012限制表面涂层中的可溶性重金属（铅、镉、铬、汞、钡、锑、砷、硒）及木质部件中的类似物质。但GB 28481限制的物质范围和清单与ECHA候选清单存在重大差异。中国出口商通常在中国法律下没有系统性的SVHC追踪义务，导致欧盟市场合规文件存在差距。
summary.zht: 中國對家具物品沒有與REACH SVHC候選清單披露義務直接對應的制度。GB 28481-2012限制表面塗層中的可溶性重金屬（鉛、鎘、鉻、汞、鋇、銻、砷、硒）及木質部件中的類似物質。但GB 28481限制的物質範圍和清單與ECHA候選清單存在重大差異。中國出口商通常在中國法律下沒有系統性的SVHC追蹤義務，導致歐盟市場合規文件存在差距。

standards_or_laws: GB 28481-2012 — Safety technical requirements for furniture (mandatory GB, SAMR)

gap.en: Chinese furniture exporters must conduct SVHC screening across all materials and components against the current ECHA Candidate List. There is no Chinese equivalent obligation, so this is typically a new compliance activity for exporters. Key substances to screen in furniture: certain phthalates (DEHP, DBP, BBP, DIBP — restricted under REACH Annex XVII Entry 51 at 0.1% in plasticised articles), lead and lead compounds (Entry 63), certain flame retardants on the Candidate List. SVHC screening requires material declarations from all supply chain members and may require laboratory analysis for complex composite articles.
gap.zh: 中国家具出口商须对照ECHA候选清单当前版本，对所有材料和部件进行SVHC筛查。由于中国没有相应义务，这对出口商而言通常是全新的合规工作。家具中需重点筛查的物质：某些邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、DBP、BBP、DIBP——依据REACH附件XVII第51条，在塑化物品中限值为0.1%）、铅及铅化合物（第63条）、候选清单中的某些阻燃剂。SVHC筛查需要供应链所有环节提供材料声明，对于复杂复合物品可能还需进行实验室分析。
gap.zht: 中國家具出口商須對照ECHA候選清單當前版本，對所有材料和部件進行SVHC篩查。由於中國沒有相應義務，這對出口商而言通常是全新的合規工作。家具中需重點篩查的物質：某些鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、DBP、BBP、DIBP——依據REACH附件XVII第51條，在塑化物品中限值為0.1%）、鉛及鉛化合物（第63條）、候選清單中的某些阻燃劑。SVHC篩查需要供應鏈所有環節提供材料聲明，對於複雜複合物品可能還需進行實驗室分析。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — REACH Articles 7(2) and 33 obligations apply to all articles (including furniture) placed on the EU market or imported; enforced by EU market surveillance and ECHA
mandatory_status.cn: Partial — GB 28481-2012 restricts some heavy metals in surface coatings; no equivalent SVHC candidate-list tracking obligation under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] REACH Articles 7(2) and 33 require SVHC disclosure and notification for furniture articles containing Candidate List substances above 0.1% w/w. There is no equivalent Chinese obligation — exporters must perform SVHC screening against the current ECHA Candidate List as a new compliance step. Key risk areas for furniture: phthalate plasticisers, lead-based pigments/stabilisers, and certain flame retardants.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】REACH第7(2)条和第33条要求对含有候选清单物质（含量超过0.1% w/w）的家具物品进行SVHC披露和申报。中国没有等同义务——出口商须对照ECHA候选清单当前版本进行SVHC筛查，作为新增合规步骤。家具的主要风险领域：邻苯二甲酸酯类增塑剂、含铅颜料/稳定剂及某些阻燃剂。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】REACH第7(2)條和第33條要求對含有候選清單物質（含量超過0.1% w/w）的家具物品進行SVHC披露和申報。中國沒有等同義務——出口商須對照ECHA候選清單當前版本進行SVHC篩查，作為新增合規步驟。家具的主要風險領域：鄰苯二甲酸酯類增塑劑、含鉛顏料/穩定劑及某些阻燃劑。
